Export

Color PDF builds the full styled report right in the app — share it or save the file. B&W sheet is the plain shop copy. CSV opens straight in Excel. Backup saves everything — counts, history, favorites, settings.

Favorites — most-used iron

Sections

Frac or Pump Down → Bleed · PRV · Monoline

The two-step picker on the Count screen. Extra spots (iron trailer, spare rack…) can be added below.

Band chart — EVO standard

Per the EWS Treating Line Standard: after each passed inspection the iron gets the band color for that month. Anything not recertified inside the window comes out of service.
